name: Chicken Curry Kabobs on Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix yogurt, garlic, curry powder, ginger, chili powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Add chicken breast to the mixture and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours, turning occasionally.
3. Soak bamboo skewers in water for 1 hour, then drain and discard excess water.
4. Thread marinated chicken onto the prepared skewers.
5. Grill the skewers over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes, turning them twice to ensure even cooking.
6. In a separate pan or serving dish, toss cooked rice with chopped tomato and sliced green onions.
7. Serve the grilled chicken kabobs over the seasoned rice.
